sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id INT PRIMARY KEY, data VARCHAR(100), num_value INT);
INSERT INTO test_strings (id, data, num_value) VALUES (1, 'Hello', 10), (2, '', 20), (3, 'World', NULL);
SELECT id, data, isstring(data) AS is_data_string FROM test_strings WHERE isstring(data) = 1;
SELECT id, data, num_value FROM test_strings WHERE (isstring(data) = 1 AND num_value <= 15);
SELECT id, data, isstring(data), num_value FROM test_strings WHERE (isstring(data) <= 1) AND num_value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id FROM test_strings WHERE isstring(data) > 0 AND (num_value <= (SELECT MIN(num_value) FROM test_strings WHERE num_value IS NOT NULL));
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_strings WHERE isstring(data) = 0 GROUP BY isstring(data) HAVING COUNT(*) > 0;
SELECT id, data FROM test_strings WHERE (SELECT isstring(data) FROM test_strings WHERE id = test_strings.id) <= 1;
CREATE TABLE test_numbers (num_id INT PRIMARY KEY, num_data INT);
SELECT ts.id, ts.data FROM test_strings ts JOIN test_numbers tn ON (isstring(ts.data) <= tn.num_data) WHERE tn.num_data > 1;
SELECT tn.num_id, isstring(CAST(tn.num_data AS VARCHAR(10))) AS is_num_string FROM test_numbers tn;
SELECT ts.id FROM test_strings ts WHERE isstring(ts.data) = 1 AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM test_numbers tn WHERE tn.num_data <= 1);
CREATE TABLE mixed_types (mixed_id INT PRIMARY KEY, mixed_value VARCHAR(50), mixed_num INT);
INSERT INTO mixed_types (mixed_id, mixed_value, mixed_num) VALUES (1, 'Test', 5), (2, NULL, 0), (3, 'Edge', NULL);
SELECT mm.mixed_id FROM mixed_types mm WHERE (isstring(mm.mixed_value) <= 1) OR (isstring(CAST(mm.mixed_num AS VARCHAR(10))) = 1);
